supersedes: no active pack after Gate 121 closeout

leaves.title: Freeze the tranche-one coefficient universe
leaves.objective: Freeze the admitted mutable surfaces, behavioural thresholds, and timing parameters that may participate in the first governed coefficient slice.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf sits at the workflow-authority boundary before any runtime change. It decides what later runtime and review leaves are even allowed to touch.
inputs: external signal coefficient handoff analysis from planning thread
ordered_actions: Read the authority docs and trace the current mutable-surface and temporal-threshold workflow surfaces.
Freeze the admitted tranche-one coefficient universe and explicit exclusions in the gate master and leaf ledger.
Record the owner stage, units, and bound class for each admitted surface.
forbidden_actions: Do not admit workbook sheets as runtime authority by attachment alone.
Do not widen the coefficient universe to legacy salvage module knobs without explicit repo truth.
expected_evidence: planning docs name the admitted tranche-one universe
test_gate122_signal_coefficient_authority_planning.py passes
definition_of_done: the pack names the admitted mutable surfaces, threshold subset, and timing parameters explicitly
excluded future surfaces are named and justified explicitly
leaves.packaging_requirement: If this leaf closes the gate, create a fresh full-history zip from the exact green repo state.

leaves.title: Map bound types and sane starter envelopes
leaves.objective: Separate one-sided clamps, score thresholds, state-definition thresholds, and timing parameters so later bounds do not drift into absurd search ranges.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf still sits upstream of runtime edits. It translates raw candidate numbers into workflow-safe coefficient classes that later runtime leaves can consume honestly.
ordered_actions: Classify each admitted item as clamp, score threshold, state-definition threshold, or timing parameter.
Freeze sane starter envelopes and asymmetry expectations for each class.
Record which items are bounded by semantic meaning rather than optimiser latitude.
forbidden_actions: Do not treat timing windows as alpha coefficients.
Do not assign 100x or 0.01x search space to semantically narrow context signals.
expected_evidence: planning docs spell out bound classes and starter-envelope discipline
definition_of_done: starter-envelope logic is frozen in planning docs before schema work starts
timing parameters are explicitly separated from coefficient-search surfaces
leaves.packaging_requirement: If this leaf closes the gate, create a fresh full-history zip from the exact green repo state.

leaves.title: Freeze coefficient-relevant preflight drift receipts
leaves.objective: Record the existing coefficient-adjacent test drift so later coefficient execution does not inherit hidden failing surfaces.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf sits at the proof-order boundary. It freezes what is already red before coefficient authority work lands so later gates can separate inherited drift from new regressions.
ordered_actions: Freeze the coefficient-relevant preflight drift slice in the planning pack.
State which failing tests must be treated as inherited drift versus target proof surfaces for later gates.
Keep the execution log receipt-empty but ready for Gate 122 execution receipts.
forbidden_actions: Do not mark inherited drift green by omission.
Do not broaden the proof slice beyond coefficient-relevant surfaces.
expected_evidence: planning docs record the inherited drift slice explicitly
execution log remains receipt-empty and status-truthful
definition_of_done: the pack names the inherited drift surfaces explicitly
Gate 122 closes only when inherited drift truth is preserved in downstream execution receipts

leaves.title: Define the new typed coefficient-authority schema
leaves.objective: Add the governed coefficient-authority contract alongside the legacy example registry without collapsing them into one ambiguous shape.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf sits at the configuration-authority boundary. It defines the file and validation shape that later runtime, review, and replay leaves will consume.
ordered_actions: Design a new typed coefficient-authority schema that names owner stage, units, baseline, min, max, transform family, and allowed upstream drivers.
Document the distinction between the new authority surface and the legacy salvage/example registry.
Update the domain model if packet or config authority naming becomes contract-significant.
forbidden_actions: Do not retrofit the legacy example registry into authority by hand-wavy comments.
Do not hide missing units or bound types behind free-text notes.
expected_evidence: new config schema exists and is documented
legacy example file is not mistaken for runtime authority
definition_of_done: a typed governed coefficient-authority contract exists
the legacy registry is explicitly reference-only unless later re-admitted
leaves.packaging_requirement: If this leaf closes the gate, create a fresh full-history zip from the exact green repo state.

leaves.title: Create the governed coefficient-authority file surface
leaves.objective: Add the first governed authority file containing the admitted mutable surfaces, starter envelopes, and metadata declared by Gate 122.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf populates the first authority instance after the schema is frozen. Downstream runtime leaves must be able to load it deterministically.
ordered_actions: Create the governed coefficient-authority file with the admitted tranche-one surfaces only.
Record owner stage, units, baseline, min, max, asymmetry, and allowed upstream drivers for each admitted item.
Keep excluded future surfaces out of the file and name them only in planning docs.
forbidden_actions: Do not backfill legacy module coefficients just because a placeholder exists.
Do not mix workbook-only research rows into runtime authority entries.
expected_evidence: governed authority file exists with tranche-one entries only
definition_of_done: the admitted tranche-one authority file exists and validates
excluded future surfaces are absent from runtime authority
leaves.packaging_requirement: If this leaf closes the gate, create a fresh full-history zip from the exact green repo state.

leaves.title: Add deterministic authority-file validation tests
leaves.objective: Prove invalid units, surfaces, ranges, and transform families fail cleanly before runtime integration begins.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf sits at the authority-validation boundary. It prevents invalid coefficient metadata from reaching runtime consumers.
ordered_actions: Add deterministic validation tests for unknown surfaces, absurd ranges, and illegal transform families.
Freeze negative-path expectations for invalid timing-parameter and threshold entries.
Keep the proof slice bounded to the new authority surface.
forbidden_actions: Do not rely on manual inspection instead of executable validation.
Do not allow semantically absurd ranges to pass because the types are numeric.
expected_evidence: invalid authority entries fail deterministically
definition_of_done: authority-file validation tests exist and run green
the governed authority surface rejects semantically absurd entries
leaves.packaging_requirement: If this leaf closes the gate, create a fresh full-history zip from the exact green repo state.

leaves.title: Externalise mutable-surface baselines and bounds
leaves.objective: Move the eight admitted mutable-surface baselines, floors, and caps onto the governed authority surface without changing their current values.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf sits at the runtime-authority boundary. It replaces private constants with governed authority while preserving the same lawful surface set.
ordered_actions: Map each admitted mutable surface to its governed authority entry.
Read the governed authority file inside StateConditionedModifierService rather than private constants.
Keep numeric values unchanged in this leaf.
forbidden_actions: Do not widen or retune the values while changing authority source.
Do not introduce fallback guesswork if the authority file is malformed.
expected_evidence: mutable-surface values load from governed authority with no numerical drift
definition_of_done: the runtime no longer treats hard-coded mutable-surface constants as final authority
admitted values match the pre-Gate-124 numeric behaviour

leaves.title: Wire governed authority through the runtime packet
leaves.objective: Ensure modifier runtime packets and downstream consumers use the governed authority-loaded baselines and bounds rather than private parallel copies.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf sits at the packet-carriage boundary between modifier resolution and downstream execution/review consumption.
ordered_actions: Propagate governed baseline metadata into the runtime packet and downstream consumers.
Delete or retire any parallel constant path that can disagree with governed authority.
Keep grammar order unchanged.
forbidden_actions: Do not introduce a second private authority path in cognition_runtime.
Do not smuggle grammar-order changes into coefficient plumbing work.
expected_evidence: downstream consumers read the same governed authority-backed packet
definition_of_done: posture, execution, and runtime carriage point at the same governed baseline metadata

ordered_actions: Run the declared scenario/regression slice against the governed-authority runtime.

Update the domain model if the carriage shape changes materially.
Keep backward compatibility explicit if compatibility hints remain.

Do not leave the domain model stale after packet-shape changes.

inherited_preflight_drift.interpretation: Inherited drift frozen before Gate 123 schema work; later coefficient-authority execution must not claim these failures are newly introduced.
